title: Craftable Enchanted Golden Apple recipe
description: A simple datapack that adds back the possibility to craft enchanted golden apples/notch apples/god apples/whatever you want to call them.
body:
Being able to craft enchanted golden apples was really amazing wasn't it? Well look no further because this simple datapack adds back their recipe making you able to craft them once again.
Notch apples shouldn't be as rare as they are, and this datapack offers an easy but effective fix for it!



![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43211d3e11593e831a5f80b327c4da31302b160d.png)
